wpcs_compliance.analysis: Uses $GLOBALS which is an anti-pattern per WP coding standards. Should use DI or a singleton.

security.analysis: $GLOBALS access is fragile and bypasses encapsulation. Could cause conflicts if another plugin uses same global key.

performance.analysis: Delegates to admin_forms. No performance issues inherent.

wp_api_usage.analysis: $GLOBALS is a procedural hack. WP encourages class-based access patterns.

code_quality.analysis: The $GLOBALS accessor is a code smell. String concatenation for key lookup is error-prone.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Fragile dependency on $GLOBALS[$this->plugin_prefix.'admin_interface']. If that key is unset, fatal error.

i18n.analysis: No direct strings. Delegates to admin_forms.

accessibility.analysis: Delegates to admin_forms which should handle a11y.

reasoning.key_observation: $GLOBALS accessor is a fragile anti-pattern that bypasses proper encapsulation.

code:
function init_form_fields() {
				
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Slider Description Text', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( "The a3 Responsive Slider shortcode embed tool on all post types and pages allows you to add a custom slider description that shows below the slider. The settings below enable you to style the description text and it's container to match this skin.", 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Text Align', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_position',
				'type' 		=> 'select',
				'default'	=> 'center',
				'options'	=> array(
					'top-left'		=> __( 'Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'top-right'		=> __( 'Center', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-right'	=> __( 'Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				),
				'css' 		=> 'width:160px;',
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Font', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_font',
				'type' 		=> 'typography',
				'default'	=> array( 'size' => '14px', 'line_height' => '1.4em', 'face' => 'Arial, sans-serif', 'style' => 'normal', 'color' => '#000000' )
			),
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Description Container', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Container Padding', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_padding',
				'type' 		=> 'array_textfields',
				'ids'		=> array( 
 								array( 
											'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_padding_top',
 											'name' 		=> __( 'Top', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
 											'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
 											'default'	=> 10 ),
 
 								array(  'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_padding_bottom',
	 											'name' 		=> __( 'Bottom', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 											'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 											'default'	=> 10 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_padding_left',
 											'name' 		=> __( 'Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
 											'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
 											'default'	=> 0 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_padding_right',
 											'name' 		=> __( 'Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
 											'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
 											'default'	=> 0 ),
 							)
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Container Background Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> __( 'Default', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) . ' [default_value]',
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_background_colour',
				'type' 		=> 'color',
				'default'	=> '#000000'
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Container Background Transparency', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'Scale - 0 = 100% transparent - 100 = 100% Solid Colour.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_background_transparency',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 60,
				'min'		=> 0,
				'max'		=> 100,
				'increment'	=> 10,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Container Border', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_border',
				'type' 		=> 'border',
				'default'	=> array( 'width' => '0px', 'style' => 'solid', 'color' => '#000000', 'corner' => 'rounded' , 'rounded_value' =>4 )
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Description Container Shadow', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'shortcode_description_shadow',
				'type' 		=> 'box_shadow',
				'default'	=> array( 'enable' => 0, 'h_shadow' => '5px' , 'v_shadow' => '5px', 'blur' => '2px' , 'spread' => '2px', 'color' => '#DBDBDB', 'inset' => '' )
			),
			
        ));
	}

wpcs_compliance.analysis: Heavy inline config. Uses __() correctly. apply_filters() for extensibility is good. No sanitization needed as this is config data.

security.analysis: Admin config only. No user input. Static defaults. Safe.

performance.analysis: Large config array defined on every call. No caching of form fields. Should be cached in __construct.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Uses apply_filters and __() correctly. Standard WP admin config pattern.

code_quality.analysis: Very large function (95 lines) defining nested config arrays. Difficult to maintain. Inconsistent indentation. Typo: 'lenght' should be 'length' in similar fields. Grammar: 'it's container' should be 'its container'.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Sets $this->form_fields which is used by settings_form. Reasonable flow.

i18n.analysis: All visible strings use __(). However the desc uses single quotes wrapping single quotes in one place which could cause PHP parse issues.

accessibility.analysis: Admin config. UI rendering delegated. Config itself is accessible. Missing 'bottom-left' option in align dropdown compared to caption version.

reasoning.key_observation: Large config-heavy function with grammar error 'it's container' and missing 'bottom-left' align option.

wpcs_compliance.analysis: Standard WP plugin class constructor pattern. Uses __() for messages. Spacing is inconsistent.

security.analysis: Admin hooks only. No user input. Message strings are static.

performance.analysis: O(n) hook registrations on construct. Standard pattern.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Uses add_action correctly. Multiple hook registrations follow plugin pattern.

code_quality.analysis: 'reseted' should be 'reset'. Excessive tabs for alignment. Many hooks registered makes maintenance hard. Duplicate action registrations on _settings_end.

i18n.analysis: Uses __() correctly. Grammar issue: 'reseted' is not correct past tense (should be 'reset').

accessibility.analysis: Admin config. No direct UI concerns.

reasoning.key_observation: Standard constructor pattern but with 'reseted' grammar error and excessive hook registrations.

performance.analysis: Single O(1) filter registration.

performance.analysis: Lazy eval pattern used.

reasoning.key_observation: Lazily-evaluated caption config. Same 'sider' typo in callback name.

function init_form_fields() {
				
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Image Caption Settings', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'enable_slider_caption',
				'class'		=> 'enable_slider_caption',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value' 	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
			),
			
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
				'class'		=> 'slider_caption_container'
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Position', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_position',
				'type' 		=> 'select',
				'default'	=> 'bottom-left',
				'options'	=> array(
					'top-left'		=> __( 'Top Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'top-right'		=> __( 'Top Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-left'	=> __( 'Bottom Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-right'	=> __( 'Bottom Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				),
				'css' 		=> 'width:160px;',
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Lenght', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'characters', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_lenght',
				'type' 		=> 'text',
				'default'	=> 200,
				'css'		=> 'width:60px;'
			),
			array(

				'default'	=> 60,

				'increment'	=> 1,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Font', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),

				'type' 		=> 'typography',
				'default'	=> array( 'size' => '14px', 'line_height' => '1.4em', 'face' => 'Arial, sans-serif', 'style' => 'normal', 'color' => '#FFFFFF' )
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Container Background Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> __( 'Default', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) . ' [default_value]',
				'id' 		=> 'caption_background_colour',
				'type' 		=> 'color',
				'default'	=> '#000000'
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Container Background Transparency', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'Scale - 0 = 100% transparent - 100 = 100% Solid Colour.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_background_transparency',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 60,
				'min'		=> 0,
				'max'		=> 100,
				'increment'	=> 10,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Container Border', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_border',
				'type' 		=> 'border',
				'default'	=> array( 'width' => '0px', 'style' => 'solid', 'color' => '#000000', 'corner' => 'rounded' , 'rounded_value' =>4 )
			),
			array(

			),
			
        ));
	}

wpcs_compliance.analysis: Uses __() correctly. apply_filters for extensibility. Heavy inline config array.

security.analysis: Admin config only. Static defaults. Safe.

performance.analysis: No caching of config. Large array built on every call.

code_quality.analysis: 94-line function. 'Lenght' spelling error. 'Maximum Wide' should be 'Maximum Width'. 'Bottom Right' option missing for caption position.

i18n.analysis: All visible strings wrapped in __(). Spelling errors will appear in translations.

accessibility.analysis: Admin config. Correctly provides all 4 position options.

reasoning.key_observation: Large config function with 'Lenght' typo, 'Maximum Wide' should be 'Maximum Width'.

security.analysis: Inline script output without wp_head/wp_footer enqueue. Potential CSP issues. No nonce check though admin context.

performance.analysis: Inline JS bloats every admin page load. Should be enqueued as external file with conditional loading.

wp_api_usage.analysis: Violates WP script enqueue conventions. Should use wp_enqueue_script instead of raw script tags.

code_quality.analysis: Raw inline JS with PHP heredoc-style output. jQuery no-conflict wrapper used (good). Event binding on $(document).on() is correct for delegation.

dependency_integrity.analysis: Depends on jQuery being loaded. Relies on CSS class '.slider_caption_container' existing.

accessibility.analysis: Visibility toggling for admin controls. No a11y concerns but not keyboard accessible admin UI.

reasoning.key_observation: Inline script output violates WP enqueue standards; should use wp_enqueue_script.

function init_form_fields() {
		
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
		
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Template Name', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'a3_rslider_template_2',
				'type' 		=> 'text',
				'default'	=> __( 'Template 2', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'separate_option'	=> true,
				'custom_attributes'	=> array( 'maxlength' => 17 )
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Activate Template', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'is_activated',
				'class'		=> 'is_activated',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value'	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),	
			),
			
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
				'class'		=> 'is_activated_on',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Mobile Skin', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'Active custom mobile skin', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'is_used_mobile_skin',
				'class'		=> 'is_used_mobile_skin',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value'	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),	
			),
			
        ));
	}
